creator: dburr@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Imported, with one minor change.  (pkg/DESCR was too long -- portlint 
recommends a max. length of 24 lines, so I abridged it.) 

Sorry this took so long.  I've been out of touch due to a series of 
hardware mishaps.  Then I started a new job, which required my attention 
for a while...
